name: Hayabusa/History
intro: In the north of the Cadia Riverlands there lies a thick forest within a canyon. All around is aesthetic beauty, yet with a harsh and dangerous air. Myriad waterfalls flow like lengths of white silk, the water resounding throughout the area as it's splashed high into the heavens. When the wind picks up, fog and cherry blossoms float in the air—this is the home of the ninja, the Scarlet Shadow.
